Meta.title: MenuVision | QR digital menus for restaurants
Meta.description: MenuVision is a QR-powered digital menu for restaurants worldwide. Update dishes in real time, display allergens and dietary filters, and show dish videos—all from one back office. No customer app required.
Meta.ogImageAlt: MenuVision digital menu: QR menu with allergens and dish videos

Contact.heading: Contact us
Contact.subtitle: Ready to level up with a QR digital menu? We’ll help you roll out the best setup for your venue.

items.question: What is MenuVision?
items.answer: MenuVision is a digital platform that lets restaurants present their menu in an interactive, modern way on any device—via a simple QR code.

items.question: How do I update my menu?
items.answer: Update everything in real time from the back office. Changes appear instantly on every guest device—no reprints.

items.question: Do guests need an app?
items.answer: No. Diners scan the QR with their phone camera to open the digital menu. No downloads required.

items.question: Can I highlight recommended dishes or allergens?
items.answer: Yes. Flag chef recommendations and list allergens and dietary notes so guests can filter with confidence.

items.question: Why choose it over a printed menu?
items.answer: It’s more hygienic, always current, supports rich media, and improves the experience with filters and recommendations.

items.question: How do I sign up for MenuVision?
items.answer: Reach out through the website form or email and we’ll help you launch a tailored digital menu fast.
